inputs.label: Average Daily Demand
inputs.businessContext: The steady-state average daily usage rate derived from historical demand data.

businessContext_i18n.en: The steady-state average daily usage rate derived from historical demand data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçmiş talep verilerinden elde edilen kararlı durum ortalama günlük kullanım oranı.

inputs.label: Demand Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Variability of daily demand, measured as standard deviation, reflecting forecast error.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variability of daily demand, measured as standard deviation, reflecting forecast error.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük talebin standart sapma olarak ölçülen değişkenliği, tahmin hatasını yansıtır.

inputs.label: Average Lead Time
inputs.businessContext: Mean replenishment lead time from supplier, in days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean replenishment lead time from supplier, in days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçiden ortalama yenileme süresi, gün cinsinden.

inputs.label: Lead Time Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Variability of lead time, measured as standard deviation, reflecting supply uncertainty.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variability of lead time, measured as standard deviation, reflecting supply uncertainty.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarik süresinin standart sapma olarak ölçülen değişkenliği, tedarik belirsizliğini yansıtır.

inputs.label: Service Level (Z-score)
inputs.businessContext: Z-score corresponding to desired service level (e.g., 1.65 for 95% fill rate). Must be positive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Z-score corresponding to desired service level (e.g., 1.65 for 95% fill rate). Must be positive.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen hizmet seviyesine karşılık gelen Z-skoru (örneğin, %95 doluluk oranı için 1,65). Pozitif olmalıdır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
